manga_subject: A fierce Indian female warrior with a sharp jawline, a bindi, and long dark hair tied in a combat braid. She has a deep scar across her right eyebrow.

panels.art_style: Hyper-detailed cross-hatching, heavy ink work, dark and gritty atmosphere, realistic anatomical proportions.
panels.outfit: Heavy plate armor with battle damage; a massive serrated sword on her back.
panels.environment: A battlefield of eclipse; dark, swirling clouds and demonic silhouettes.

panels.art_style: Soft, flowy lines, large sparkling eyes with many highlights, pastel color palette, delicate features.
panels.outfit: Ornate warrior gown with celestial patterns and a glowing tiara.
panels.environment: A dreamy moonlit garden with floating rose petals.

panels.art_style: Realistic urban detail, cinematic lighting, thick outlines, focus on mechanical and architectural grit.
panels.outfit: Cybernetic battle suit with wires and futuristic plating.
panels.environment: A neon-lit street of Neo-Tokyo with cracked concrete and debris.

panels.art_style: Painterly, watercolor textures, gentle character design, emphasis on nature and soft lighting.
panels.outfit: Traditional simple linen robes with a leather belt and a small wooden flute.
panels.environment: A lush, sun-dappled forest with a sparkling waterfall.

panels.art_style: Dramatic high-fashion posing, heavy shading, vibrant and unusual color theory, bold facial features.
panels.outfit: Designer leather armor with gold studs and heart-shaped cutouts.
panels.environment: A baroque palace with dramatic speed lines and 'Menacing' onomatopoeia.

panels.art_style: Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetic, bold line art, flowing elemental effects (water/fire).
panels.outfit: Checkered sari-patterned haori over a demon slayer uniform.
panels.environment: A snowy mountain path with wisteria flowers in the evening.

panels.art_style: Clean line work, specific hand-drawn shading, tactical character design.
panels.outfit: Jonin-style flak jacket with an Indian-motif forehead protector.
panels.environment: A training ground in the Hidden Leaf Village with wooden targets.

panels.art_style: Angular muscle definition, sharp eyes, iconic spiky hair highlights, saturated colors.
panels.outfit: Saiyan-style combat armor with gold-plated shoulder pads.
panels.environment: A barren, rocky wasteland with floating debris and a dual sun.

panels.art_style: High-contrast black and white, sharp clothing folds, intense and stylish character design.
panels.outfit: A sleek white Shinigami-style captain's robe (haori) with a curved sword.
panels.environment: White stone buildings of the Seireitei under a clear blue sky.

negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, incorrect anatomy, text, western features, inconsistent face
